mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > NOW())
SELECT * FROM user_roles WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND is_active = 1 AND deleted = 0
SELECT DISTINCT role_id FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > NOW())
SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM user_roles WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND is_active = 1 AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM user_roles WHERE is_active = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at BETWEEN NOW() AND DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
